data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp employs a microservices architecture to handle its large-scale user base, enabling efficient scalability and maintenance.
data.technical_spec: Multiple loosely coupled, independent services with APIs for communication.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption Protocol
data.description: Ensures that only the communicating users can read the messages, using a cryptographic protocol designed for secure communication.
data.technical_spec: Uses a Signal Protocol-based design for message encryption.

data.title: Real-time Messaging Framework
data.description: Facilitates real-time message delivery and synchronization across platforms.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes XMPP for message routing and synchronous updates.

data.title: Peer-to-Peer Networking
data.description: Optimizes call quality and reliability by establishing direct connections between users when possible.
data.technical_spec: Leverages ICE, STUN, and TURN protocols.

data.title: Data Redundancy and Load Balancing
data.description: Utilizes global data centers to ensure high availability and load management.
data.technical_spec: Employs CDN and distributed databases for load distribution.
